political.s: Via parent company Mondelez International: FEC: $20K PAC donations; 49% to Republican, 51% to Democratic committees.

labor.s: Via parent company Mondelez International: 41 federal penalties totaling $75.8M since 2000 (Violation Tracker). Supply-chain signals: KnowTheChain 52/100; CHRB 13.6/26; TVPRA exposure; AU MS statement.

environment.s: Via parent company Mondelez International: CDP Climate Change: A (2024) — leadership-band environmental disclosure with validated targets.

dei.s: Via parent company Mondelez International: HRC Corporate Equality Index 100/100 (2025) — top-tier LGBTQ+ workplace equality rating. Bloomberg Gender-Equality Index member (2024) — transparent on female leadership, equal pay, inclusive culture.

animals.s: Via parent company Mondelez International: Ethical Consumer Avoid — palm oil, cocoa supply-chain, tax conduct. [ethical-consumer]

execPay.s: Via parent company Mondelez International: CEO-to-median-worker pay ratio 645:1 (median employee pay $38,024) — SEC proxy statement (DEF 14A, 2026).

wiki.extract: Tate's Bake Shop, Inc. is a baked goods manufacturer, known for its chocolate chip cookies. It was founded by Kathleen King in Southampton, New York, in 2000 and has been owned by Mondelez International since 2018.

health.s: Via parent company Mondelez International: 4 CPSC recalls (1 in past 24 months); latest hazard: the recalled resin menorahs can burn or catch fire when holding lit candles.
